description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation, Scalene/Memray profiling suite, and performance benchmarks for the Hansard corpus.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 19 implementation added telemetry dependency declarations, safe OpenTelemetry setup, console and JSONL file trace exporters, pipeline span instrumentation, profiling runners, docs, benchmark workflow, evidence helpers, and focused tests. The full suite now passes in the local venv and is recorded in artifacts/track19/full_suite_validation.json and artifacts/track19/full_suite_validation.txt. The remaining 1 GiB/full-corpus Scalene/Memray profiling work was not completed on this Windows host and is now recorded as a roadmap note rather than a separate track. The fixture benchmark runs unskipped in Pixi and is recorded in artifacts/track19/benchmark_20260624.json. Memray remains unavailable on Windows because the Pixi dependency is platform-gated.
